GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: A Phase 2a, Randomized, Observer-Blind, Placebo-Controlled, Dose-Confirmation Study to Evaluate the Safety, Reactogenicity, and Immunogenicity of mRNA-1273 SARS-CoV-2 Vaccine in Adults Aged 18 Years and Older

MetaDataVersion.Name: Study COVID-19 Phase 2 Part A Data Definitions

ItemGroupDef.Name: TA
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned element per arm

ItemGroupDef.Name: TE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned element

ItemGroupDef.Name: TI
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per I/E criterion

ItemGroupDef.Name: TS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per trial summary parameter value

ItemGroupDef.Name: TV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned visit per arm

ItemGroupDef.Name: CO
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per comment per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per actual element per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per actual visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: XM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: CM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per recorded medication occurrence or constant-dosing interval per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: EC
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per protocol-specified study treatment, collected-dosing interval, per subject, per mood

ItemGroupDef.Name: EX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per constant dosing interval per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: PR
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per recorded procedure per occurrence per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: AE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per adverse event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: CE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per disposition status or protocol milestone per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per protocol deviation per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: ER
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: HO
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per healthcare encounter per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: MH
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per medical history event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: VE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: IE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per inclusion/exclusion criterion not met per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: IS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per test per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: LB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per analyte per planned time point number per time point reference per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: MB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per microbiology specimen finding per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: RP
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per Reproductive System Finding per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: VS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per vital sign measurement per time point per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: FAAE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per object per time point per time point reference per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: FACE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per object per time point per time point reference per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: FAOT
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per finding per object per time point per time point reference per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: RELREC
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per related record, group of records or datasets

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPAE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPCE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPCM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPDM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPDS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPDV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPER
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPFAAE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPFACE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPFAOT
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPHO
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPIS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPLB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPMB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPMH
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPPR
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPRP
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPSS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPVE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPVS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPXM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL and QNAM value per subject

Study Day of End of Observation

Study Day of End of Treatment

Study Day of Start of Observation

End Date/Time of Medical History Event

EnumeratedItem.CodedValue: MET ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA BUT NOT NEEDED

EnumeratedItem.CodedValue: The participant had close contact with a person known to have SARS-CoV-2 infection or COVID-19

EnumeratedItem.CodedValue: COHORT 1: AGE >= 18 TO < 55 MRNA-1273 OR PLACEBO
WHITE, AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE

EnumeratedItem.CodedValue: STUDY TREATMENT NOT GIVEN, MISSED VISIT

Description.TranslatedText: Number of days a Solicited Adverse Reaction lasted beyond Day 7 when AE ended after Day 7 of Dose. Otherwise AEENDTC-AESTDTC+1 if Solicited Adverse Event ended before or on Day 7.
Set to "DOSE 1" concatenate date time of Dose 1 if AE Onset date time is before dose 2 date time or dose 2 date time is missing, otherwise set to "DOSE 2" concatenate date time of Dose 2
set to "AE-" + AE log number by subject identifier
Set to "Y" if any adverse event with start date (AE.AESTDTC) occurring on or after the first dose of study drug (SDTM.DM.RFSTDTC); If AE.AESTDTC is partial, uses SUPPAE.AESTDTCI instead
Last symptom event assessment date time based on CETPTREF within observed period (7 days)
Number of days with symptom event occurred within observed period (7 Days) based on CETPTREF
Date of last occurrence of event of each vaccine
First symptom event occured date time based on CETPTREF within observed period (7 days)

Higest grade from uncollapsed data from FACE. For Erythema and Swelling, assign grade based on LIDAM size. For Fever, assign grade basde on temprature. Grading is based on protocol Table 6: Solicited Adverse Reactions and Grades.
Set to ONGOING if Ongoing checked
Set to DM.RFPENDTC if CMENRTPT is non-missing
Set to 'Y' if reason of discontinue treatment, and /or end of study is death or outcome of an AE is fatal, otherwise, set to missing
Set to the last non-missing study drug exposure date/time
Set to date of completed, or discontinued from study, or last assessment date if subject is still ongoing
Set to the first non-missing study drug exposure date/time
Set to the last non-missing study drug exposure date/time
Set to the first non-missing study drug exposure date/time
Set to maximum SE.EPOCH where --DTC is greater or equal to SESTDTC and Less than or equal to SEENDTC.
Set to "DOSE 1" if VISIT="VISIT 1 DAY 1" or "DOSE 2" if VISIT="VISIT 4 DAY 29"
Set to Placebo or mRNA-1273 after merging by randomization ID from randomization file
--ENDTC - DM.RFSTDTC if --ENDTC < RFSTDTC, --ENDTC - DM.RFSTDTC + 1 if --ENDTC >= RFSTDTC
Set to 0 if EXTRT = "PLACEBO" or set to Actual dose from IRT
Set to Placebo or mRNA-1273 after merging by randomization ID from randomization file
Set to DOSE 1 if symptom event occurred before dose 2 or dose 2 has not started yet, otherwise set to DOSE 2 if symptom event occurred after dose2
Set to hospital discharge date if HO.HOTERM="HOSPITAL", or set to last MEDICAL ATTENDED date if HO.HOTERM="MEDICAL ATTENDED", set to null otherwise
Set to "Y" if HO.HOTERM="MEDICAL ATTENDED", set to "Y" if HOTERM="ADMITTED TO ICU" and HODUR>0, set to null if HO.HOTERM="HOSPITAL", otherwise, set to "N"

If data source is from adverse event, then Set to "DOSE 1" concatenate date time of Dose 1 if AE Onset date time is before dose 2 date time or dose 2 date time is missing, otherwise set to "DOSE 2" concatenate date time of Dose 2; If data source is from e-Diary, then Set "DOSE 1" data time of Dose 1 if Medical Attended event occurred before dose 2 date time or dose 2 date time is missing, otherwise, set to "DOSE 2" concatenate date time of Dose 2
Set to hospital admin date if HO.HOTERM="HOSPITAL", or set to first MEDICAL ATTENDED date if HO.HOTERM="MEDICAL ATTENDED", set to null otherwise

Set to "HOSPITAL" if an event captured in AE form indicates this event requires hospitalization, set to "ADMITTED TO ICU" if an event captured in AE form indicates this event requires ICU, set to "MEDICAL ATTENDED" if an AR symptom indicates this AR symptom requires MEDICAL ATTENDED
Set to 'Y' for last non missing measurement (including repeated and unscheduled assessments) where LBDTC on or before RFSTDTC by each LBCAT and LBTESTCD
Reference Range Indicator based upon standard results and ranges
Numeric values of LBORRES converted to standard units
Set to 'Y' for last non missing measurement (including repeated and unscheduled assessments) where MBDTC on or before RFSTDTC by each MBTESTCD

For screening element (SCREEN), end date is first dose date if non missing -1 day, or end of participation date if subject never dosed; For blinded treatment element (V-50, V-100, PBO), end date is last dose date if non missing + 27 days or the end of participation date which ever come to first; For follow-up blinded phase element (FUPA), end date is Participant Decision Visit/OL-D1 visit date if non missing - 1 day or the end of participation date which ever come to first.

For screening element (SCREEN), start date is Informed Consent date; For blinded treatment element (V-50, V-100, PBO), start date is first dose date; For follow-up blinded phase element (FUPA), start date is last dose date if non missing + 28 days.
Set to maximum SE.EPOCH where --STDTC is greater or equal to SESTDTC and Less than or equal to SEENDTC
--STDTC - DM.RFSTDTC if --STDTC < DM.RFSTDTC, --STDTC - DM.RFSTDTC + 1 if --STDTC >= DM.RFSTDTC
Set to DS.DSSPID if AE leading to discontinue treatment (where DS.DSSCAT="STUDY TREATMENT") or end of study (where DS.DSSCAT="END OF STUDY")
Set to HO.HOSPID if AE leading to hospitalization and /or ICU
Set to "Y" if SUPPAE.QNAM="AESOLFL" and SUPPAE.QVAL="Y", and AE.AESER ne "Y" and the event was not last beyond day 7
Set to Severity/Intensity captured from AE where Solicited AE flag is "Y" and AEDECOD is pre-define solicited symptom event
set to "AE-" + AE log number by subject identifier
Set to 'STUDY SUBJECT' if from eDiary, else set to 'INVESTIGATOR'
Set to DS.DSSPID If reactogenicity leading to discontinue treatment (where DS.DSSCAT="STUDY TREATMENT") or end of study (where DS.DSSCAT="END OF STUDY")
Set to HO.HOSPID if reactogenicity leading to medical attention
Set to Y if required any medical attention during observed period (7-days) after each vaccination
Set to "MISSED DIARY ASSESSMENT" if subject unreported symptom assessment at least one day during observed period (7-days) after each vaccination

If RACE='MULTIPLE', then set to 'WHITE' when checked, set to ' BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN' when checked, set to 'ASIAN' when checked, set to 'AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE' '' when checked, set to 'NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDERS' when checked, concatenate 'OTHER: ' with Race Other specify when checked. Concatenate all possible values above with ', '
Set to AESPID (AE log number) if discontinue treatment or end of study is due to AE or SAE
Set to "STUDY SUBJECT" if source data is from e-Diary Set to "INVESTIGATOR" if source data is from AE
Set to "Y" if data is collected from local diagnostic test form
Set to visit date taking the last one recorded
Set to visit date taking the first one recorded
The compound identifier is formed by studyid, siteid and subjid separated by hyphen '-'
VSORRES value converted into standard units
Numeric values of VSORRES converted to standard units
Set to 'Y' for last non missing measurement (including repeated and unscheduled assessments) where VSDTC on or before RFSTDTC by each VSTESTCD where VSCAT is not "REACTOGENICITY"
--DTC - DM.RFSTDTC if --DTC < DM.RFSTDTC, --DTC - DM.RFSTDTC + 1 if --DTC >= DM.RFSTDTC
Assigned values from 1010 to 1150 for each event term with Dose 1 and assigned values from 2010 to 2150 for each event term with Dose 2
Order within each USUBJID and generated the key sequence of the domain
Set to EXSTDTC based on CETPTREF

Set to "ADMINISTRATION SITE" for Pain, Redness,Swelling Underarm Gland and Injection site pages. and "SYSTEMIC" for Headache, Fatigue, Muscle ache, Joints ache, Nausea, Chills, Rash, and Temperature pages
Set to "NOT DONE" if no event data is collected within 7 days of each vaccine
Get detailed dosing error information for the injection where dosing error occurred
Set to Set to "INJECTION" if Treatment given

1.Not Done Check box was not included in ePRO. ePRO is based on Window Open and Close to collect data, Mapping assumptions are a.--STAT = NOT DONE if subject did not enter a symptom data within window open duration b.--STAT = Blank if subjid entered a symptom data within window open duration
Toxicity Grade is based on results in std. unit and definition from CEBR Guideline
Missing units as not applicable for categorical results "Y" and "N"
Based on randomization number from IRT
For the same subject with multiple screening number, USUBJID will be based on primary enrollment screen number. See RG 3.4.20
Set to TV.VISITNUM based on VISIT
